arguments.content:
# Weekly Work Plan: April 13–17, 2026

**Sprint**: Sprint 9, Week 2  
**Team**: Backend Team  
**Focus**: Documentation, Planning & Technical Foundation

---

## Monday, April 13

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Review and finalize Sprint 9 technical specification
- [ ] Update Q2 roadmap with three new feature plans
- [ ] Compile tech debt inventory for the sprint
- [ ] Attend Sprint 9 kickoff meeting

### Expected Deliverables
- ✅ Sprint 9 Tech Spec (`20260413_sprint9_tech_spec.md`)
- ✅ Updated Q2 Roadmap (`roadmap_draft.md`)
- ✅ Tech Debt List (`20260413_tech_debt.json`)
- Sprint 9 kickoff meeting notes

---

## Tuesday, April 14

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Begin Redis cluster setup for distributed caching layer
- [ ] Review and refactor legacy authentication middleware (TD-001)
- [ ] Design WebSocket connection manager architecture

### Expected Deliverables
- Redis cluster configuration documentation
- Auth middleware refactor PR (draft)
- WebSocket architecture diagram

---

## Wednesday, April 15

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Implement Kafka topic structure for real-time sync engine
- [ ] Consolidate database connection pooling (TD-002)
- [ ] Code review: auth middleware refactor

### Expected Deliverables
- Kafka topic configuration and documentation
- DB pooling consolidation PR
- Auth middleware refactor PR (ready for merge)

---

## Thursday, April 16

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Deploy Redis cluster to staging environment
- [ ] Begin GraphQL schema design for API gateway
- [ ] Update deprecated crypto methods (TD-003)

### Expected Deliverables
- Redis cluster live in staging
- GraphQL schema design document
- Crypto API update PR

---

## Friday, April 17

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Weekly progress review and demo
- [ ] Sprint 9 mid-point retrospective
- [ ] Plan next week's priorities
- [ ] Remove hardcoded endpoints (TD-004) — begin implementation

### Expected Deliverables
- Weekly demo presentation
- Retrospective notes and action items
- Next week's task breakdown
- Service discovery migration PR (draft)

---

## Week Summary

| Day | Focus Area | Key Deliverable |
|-----|------------|-----------------|
| Mon | Planning & Documentation | Tech Spec, Roadmap, Tech Debt |
| Tue | Caching & Auth | Redis setup, Auth refactor |
| Wed | Messaging & DB | Kafka config, DB pooling |
| Thu | Staging & GraphQL | Redis live, Schema design |
| Fri | Review & Planning | Demo, Retrospective, Next week plan |

---

## Blockers & Risks

| Risk | Mitigation | Owner |
|------|------------|-------|
| Redis cluster setup delays | Have Docker Compose fallback ready | Alex Zhang |
| Auth refactor scope creep | Strict code freeze by EOD Wednesday | Backend Team |
| Kafka topic naming conflicts | Prefix all topics with `s9.` | Backend Team |

---

## Appendix

### Related Documents
- [Sprint 9 Tech Spec](./20260413_sprint9_tech_spec.md)
- [Tech Debt List](./20260413_tech_debt.json)
- [Q2 Roadmap](./roadmap_draft.md)
